raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Move to fresh air immediately.
STEP 2: Loosen tight clothing around the neck and waist.
STEP 3: Sit upright to make breathing easier.
DO NOT: Induce vomiting or inhale other chemicals.
ESCALATE: Call emergency services or a poison control center if breathing worsens or chest pain persists.

immediate_steps: Loosen tight clothing around the neck and waist.
Sit upright to make breathing easier.
do_not_do: Induce vomiting or inhale other chemicals.
escalate_when: Call emergency services or a poison control center if breathing worsens or chest pain persists.
